controlSet.description: Restrict action to declared purpose and action class
Require downstream processors to inherit and enforce consent constraints
Require accessible audit reference for governed use

rules: Require purpose binding and permitted action before execution
Deny downstream processing when inheritance conditions are not met
Suspend or deny on revocation, expiry, or context mismatch

threats.label: Purpose Drift
threats.description: Controller reuses captured consent for a different purpose or action class

threats.label: Downstream Bypass
threats.description: Delegated processor acts without inheriting the original constraints

notes: This package is authored as TSMM-native source, not as an external artifact with a TSMM mapping.
Controls and lifecycle semantics are extracted from the package-local TSMM model.
